evaluators.name: Website Redesign Quote Request Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user submitted a website redesign quote request with a page count, $8,000 exact budget, correct timeline, and complete contact details.

evaluators.name: Cheapest Qualifying Maintenance Plan Onboarding Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user chose the cheapest active monthly maintenance plan with at least 10 support hours and submitted onboarding with valid details and a start date on the first day of next month.

evaluators.name: Ecommerce Conversion Case Study Shortlist Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user filtered ecommerce case studies by conversion uplift, then shortlisted and reopened the top qualifying project from their shortlist.

evaluators.name: SaaS Onboarding UX Article Reading List Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user searched for 2023 SaaS onboarding content, then saved and reopened the newest qualifying UX-tagged article from their reading list.

evaluators.name: Mobile App + Marketing Website Estimate Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user saved a project estimate that includes both a mobile app and a marketing website, stays within a $25,000 budget, and includes copywriting plus contact details.

evaluators.name: Discovery Call Wednesday Morning Slot Booking Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user booked the earliest available Wednesday morning 30-minute slot between 09:00 and 11:00 UTC in the current month, with complete contact details and the correct topic.

evaluators.name: UX Research Hourly 80-Hour Inquiry Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user configured an ~80 hour UX research engagement with an hourly rate under $200 and submitted an inquiry including that range, rate cap, and contact details.

evaluators.name: Branding Package Under 5000 Onboarding Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user selected the cheapest branding package under $5,000 that includes >=3 logo concepts and brand guidelines, chose one-time billing with no add-ons, and started onboarding with company details and a launch date.
